verse.verse_13: Yauma yuda‘‘ūna ilā nāri jahannama da‘‘ā(n).
verse.verse_15: Afasiḥrun hāżā am antum lā tubṣirūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Iṣlauhā faṣbirū au lā taṣbirū, sawā'un ‘alaikum, innamā tujzauna mā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_18: Fākihīna bimā ātāhum rabbuhum, wa waqāhum rabbuhum ‘ażābal-jaḥīm(i).
verse.verse_19: Kulū wasyrabū hanī'am bimā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_20: Muttaki'īna ‘alā sururim maṣfūfah(tin), wa zawwajnāhum biḥūrin ‘īn(in).
verse.verse_21: Wal-lażīna āmanū wattaba‘athum żurriyyatuhum bi'īmānin alḥaqnā bihim żurriyyatahum wa mā alatnāhum min ‘amalihim min syai'(in), kullumri'im bimā kasaba rahīn(un).
verse.verse_22: Wa amdadnāhum bifākihatiw wa laḥmim mimmā yasytahūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Yatanāza‘ūna fīhā ka'sal lā lagwun fīhā wa lā ta'ṡīm(un).
verse.verse_24: Wa yaṭūfu ‘alaihim gilmānul lahum ka'annahum lu'lu'um maknūn(un).
verse.verse_26: Qālū innā kunnā qablu fī ahlinā musyfiqīn(a).
verse.verse_28: Innā kunnā min qablu nad‘ūh(u), innahū huwal-barrur-raḥīm(u).
verse.verse_29: Fa żakkir famā anta bini‘mati rabbika  bikāhiniw wa lā majnūn(in).
verse.verse_30: Am yaqūlūna syā‘irin natarabbaṣu bihī raibal-manūn(i).
verse.verse_31: Qul tarabbaṣū fa innī ma‘akum minal-mutarabbiṣīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Am ta'muruhum aḥlāmuhum bihāżā am hum qaumun ṭāgūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Am yaqūlūna taqawwalah(ū), bal lā yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Falya'tū biḥadīṡim  miṡlihī in kānū ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_35: Am khuliqū min gairi syai'in am humul-khāliqūn(a).
verse.verse_36: Am khalaqus-samāwāti wal-arḍ(a), bal lā yūqinūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Am lahum sullamuy yastami‘ūna fīh(i), falya'ti mustami‘uhum bisulṭānim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_40: Am tas'aluhum ajran fahum mim magramim muṡqalūn(a).
verse.verse_42: Am yurīdūna kaidā(n), fal-lażīna kafarū humul-makīdūn(a).
verse.verse_43: Am lahum ilāhun gairullāh(i), subḥānallāhi ‘ammā yusyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_44: Wa iy yarau kisfam minas-samā'i sāqiṭay yaqūlū saḥābum markūm(un).
verse.verse_45: Fażarhum ḥattā yulāqū yaumahumul-lażī fīhi yuṣ‘aqūn(a).
verse.verse_46: Yauma lā yugnī ‘anhum kaiduhum syai'aw wa lā hum yunṣarūn(a).
verse.verse_47: Wa inna lil-lażīna ẓalamū ‘ażāban dūna żālika wa lākinna akṡarahum lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_48: Waṣbir liḥukmi rabbika fa innaka bi'a‘yuninā wa sabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika ḥīna taqūm(u).
verse.verse_49: Wa minal-laili fa sabbiḥhu wa idbāran-nujūm(i).
